violations.text: Establishment is lacking an allergy statement on their menu. An allergen statement shall be posted on menus and/or shall be made visible to consumers, alerting them to notify staff of any food allergies. i.e. "Before placing your order, please inform your server if a person in your party has a food allergy." New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

Observed an open employees' beverage stored in a food preparation area. PIC relocated employee beverage to designated area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

Observed food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (tomato slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. PIC relocated tomato slicer to dishwasher area to be washed, rinsed and sanitized at time of inspection. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

Observed floors underneath equipment in the bar area and kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026
Observed True Refrigerator two-door gasket were observed in poor repair. PIC placed work order for gasket. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
Observed the facility lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025
